headline: RTX Sensor Milestone Puts RAIVEN Staring At Center Of Growth Story
summary: RTX (NYSE:RTX) subsidiary Raytheon completed the first flight test of its RAIVEN Staring sensor suite on a UH-60 Black Hawk helicopter. The test marked a key step for the next generation electro-optical and infrared system, focused on improved situational awareness in low visibility conditions. RAIVEN Staring is designed as a platform agnostic, scalable sensor solution aimed at air, ground, and sea applications. For RTX, this test slot sits firmly in the defense electronics and sensor...
